Interface IExecutionLoopCondition

All Superinterfaces:
IExecutionBlockStartNode<JavaStatement>, IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<JavaStatement>
All Known Implementing Classes:
ExecutionLoopCondition, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessLoopCondition
public interface IExecutionLoopCondition extends IExecutionBlockStartNode<JavaStatement>

A node in the symbolic execution tree which represents a loop condition, e.g. x >= 0.

The default implementation is ExecutionLoopCondition which is instantiated via a SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder instance.

See Also:
  • SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder
  • ExecutionLoopCondition
